summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FORGE AI V2 features: SSE streaming chat, ZIP export, Stripe payments, and mobile contrast. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All new features working correctly. One known issue with emergentintegrations library causing 502 on payment status endpoint.

minor.issue: Returns 502 due to emergentintegrations library Pydantic validation error with metadata field (StripeObject not dict)
minor.note: Checkout creation works fine, only status check fails. This is a library bug, not app code issue.

issues: Mobile media query exists but doesn't include explicit --text-2, --text-3, --border contrast overrides as mentioned in requirements. Current contrast appears acceptable but could be enhanced.

action_items: LIBRARY BUG: emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout.get_checkout_status() has Pydantic validation error with metadata field. Consider: (1) catching the error and returning cached status, or (2) reporting to Emergent team for fix.
OPTIONAL: Add explicit mobile contrast CSS overrides for --text-2, --text-3, --border in @media (max-width: 768px) block if contrast needs improvement.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment status endpoint error handling could be improved to gracefully handle library errors and return cached transaction status
BillingSuccess page handles timeout gracefully - good UX
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 features tested: SSE streaming chat (event: user, token, done), ZIP export (README.md + code blocks), Stripe checkout (creates real test sessions), Billing page (3 tiers + 2 top-ups), BillingSuccess page (polling + timeout handling). Known issue: payment status endpoint returns 502 due to emergentintegrations library bug with Pydantic metadata validation.

backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/chat/stream - SSE streaming with user/token/done events ✓
SSE stream persists both user and assistant messages ✓
SSE stream deducts 1 credit after completion ✓
SSE stream returns 404 for non-existent project ✓
ZIP contains README.md with project info ✓
GET /api/payments/packages - returns 4 packages (studio $29/2000, maison $99/10000, topup_small $10/500, topup_large $29/2000) ✓
POST /api/payments/checkout - creates Stripe session, returns url+session_id ✓
Checkout creates pending transaction in payment_transactions ✓
POST /api/webhook/stripe - endpoint exists (returns 400 for bad signature) ✓
frontend: Navbar shows Billing link for authenticated users ✓
Choose buttons call checkout and redirect to Stripe URL ✓
Project page has Export button in header ✓
Chat uses SSE: user bubble appears, assistant content streams ✓

emergentintegrations_library_bug.description: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error: metadata field expects dict but receives StripeObject
emergentintegrations_library_bug.impact: Payment status polling returns 502, but checkout creation works fine
emergentintegrations_library_bug.workaround: BillingSuccess page handles timeout gracefully and shows appropriate error message
